'''fashoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyelocystitis|pyelocystitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyelocystitis|pyelocystitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fashoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fæshereth || fæsherej || fæsheresh || fæshere
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fashoshoroth || fashoshoroj || fashoshorosh || fashoshoro
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fashoroth || fashoroj || fashorosh || fashoro
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fashofrofth || fashofrofj || fashofrofsh || fashofrof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || fashorotho || fashorojo || fashorosho || fashoroko
|-
| [[Patient]] || fashoroth || fashoroj || fashorosh || fashoro
|-
| [[Possessive]] || fashorothol || fashorojol || fashoroshol || fashorokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || fashoroothotho || fashoroojojo || fashorooshosho || fashorooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || fashorothon || fashorojon || fashoroshon || fashorokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || fashorothooro || fashorojooro || fashoroshooro || fashorokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
